question: How does the contact management feature help me keep track of clients and partners?
answer: Keep track of your contacts, gain valuable insights, analyse live data and performance metrics.

question: Can I customize the dashboards and reporting feature to display the metrics that are most important to my business?
answer: Yes, our highly customizable dashboards allow you to drag and drop widgets, ensuring you only see the metrics that matter most to your specific business goals.

question: How does the task management feature help me delegate tasks to my team and track progress?
answer: You can easily assign tasks, set deadlines, and monitor the completion status in real-time through our intuitive kanban boards and list views.

question: Can I collaborate with my team in real-time using all tools?
answer: Real-time collaboration tools, including messaging and video conferencing, are fully unlocked and available on our Premium plan.

question: Is the app available on all devices?
answer: Yes! The Growth app is fully responsive and available via web browser, as well as native applications for iOS and Android devices.

question: How does the app help me stay compliant when working with freelancers and contractors?
answer: Our Premium tier includes built-in compliance tracking, automated contract generation, and tax form management to ensure you meet all legal requirements.
